docs.title: textfsm-ai
docs.text:
AI-powered TextFSM template generator with multi-provider routing and quota management.

  • Generate TextFSM templates from raw CLI output
  • Route requests across multiple AI providers
  • Enforce per-provider quotas

docs.title: Command-line Interface
docs.text: The textfsm-ai CLI provides commands for generating templates, listing providers, and viewing quota usage.

docs.title: Quick example
docs.text:
textfsm-ai generate samples/show_ip_int_br.txt

#### `docs/cli.md`

```markdown
# Command-line interface

## Top-level command

```bash
textfsm-ai --help

docs.title: Reference
docs.text: Choose a module from the sidebar to view detailed API documentation.

docs.title: Config loader
docs.text: Loads and validates config.yaml, including providers, routing rules, and quotas.

docs.title: Providers
docs.text: Abstractions over OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and others.
